claude_analysis.summary: Recruitin automation ecosystem toont een gefaseerde audit van verschillende technische componenten, met focus op data-inventarisatie en geautomatiseerde processen. De structuur wijst op een methodische aanpak voor ecosystem mapping en integratie.

google_drive.note: Actual Drive scan requires Google Drive API integration
google_drive.recommendation:
{
  "recommended_structure": {
    "folders": [
      "Recruitment Master Folder",
      "Kandidaten Database",
      "Interview Documenten",
      "Job Descriptions",
      "Offer Letters & Contracts",
      "Onboarding Materials",
      "Recruitment Analytics",
      "Screening Templates",
      "Automation Scripts"
    ],
    "templates": [
      "Initial Screening Template",
      "Interview Evaluation Form",
      "Candidate Scorecard",
      "Reference Check Template",
      "Offer Letter Template", 
      "Rejection Email Template",
      "Skills Assessment Matrix"
    ],
    "reference_materials": [
      "Recruitment Process Flowchart",
      "Company Hiring Guidelines",
      "Skills Competency Rubrics",
      "Legal Compliance Documentation",
      "Interview Best Practices Guide",
      "Diversity & Inclusion Checklist"
    ]
  },
  "sharing_best_practices": [
    "Recruitment Team - Full Access",
    "Hiring Managers - Limited View",
    "HR Leadership - Comprehensive Dashboard",
    "Use Role-Based Permissions",
    "Anonymize Sensitive Candidate Data",
    "Enable Version Control"
  ],
  "sync_strategy": {
    "desktop_sync": true,
    "auto_sync_folders": [
      "Templates",
      "Interview Documenten", 
      "Screening Templates"
    ],
    "exclude_from_sync": [
      "Kandidaten Database",
      "Sensitive Personnel Files"
    ]
  },
  "scan_commands": [
    "Use Google Drive Audit Log",
    "Implement CloudAlly Backup",
    "Regular Permissions Scan",
    "Automated Access Review Tools",
    "Deploy DLP (Data Loss Prevention) Scans"
  ]
}

github.note: Actual GitHub scan requires GitHub API or gh CLI
github.recommendation:
{
  "recommended_repos": [
    {"name": "recruitment-automation", "purpose": "Core automation platform", "private": true},
    {"name": "candidate-tracking-system", "purpose": "Database and workflow management", "private": true},
    {"name": "interview-scheduler", "purpose": "Interview coordination tools", "private": true},
    {"name": "assessment-toolkit", "purpose": "Candidate evaluation scripts", "private": false},
    {"name": "recruitment-templates", "purpose": "Email and communication templates", "private": true}
  ],
  "code_organization": [
    "Modular microservice architecture",
    "Separate concerns between data, logic, and UI components",
    "Use dependency injection",
    "Consistent naming conventions",
    "Environment-specific configuration management"
  ],
  "documentation_needs": [
    "Comprehensive README with setup instructions",
    "Architecture decision records",
    "API documentation",
    "Installation and deployment guides",
    "Security and compliance wiki pages"
  ],
  "cicd_recommendations": [
    "Automated unit testing workflow",
    "Security vulnerability scanning",
    "Code quality checks",
    "Automated deployment to staging/production",
    "Performance benchmark tests"
  ],
  "scan_commands": [
    "gh repo list --visibility private",
    "gh secret list",
    "gh workflow list",
    "gh repo view --web",
    "gh repo create <name> --private --template"
  ]
}

claude_projects.note: Actual Claude Projects scan requires manual review or API access

api_integrations.note: Actual API tests require credentials - run separately
api_integrations.recommendation:
{
  "apis": [
    {
      "service": "Pipedrive",
      "auth_method": "OAuth 2.0 / API Token",
      "test_endpoint": "/users/me",
      "test_command": "curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN' https://api.pipedrive.com/v1/users/me",
      "rate_limits": "1 request/second, 50,000 requests/day",
      "estimated_monthly_cost": "$50-$100 depending on user tier"
    },
    {
      "service": "Gmail",
      "auth_method": "OAuth 2.0 / Google Workspace API",
      "test_endpoint": "/gmail/v1/users/me/profile",
      "test_command": "python google_api_test.py --get_profile",
      "rate_limits": "250 queries/day for basic accounts, 1500/day for enterprise",
      "estimated_monthly_cost": "Free with Google Workspace account"
    },
    {
      "service": "Hugging Face",
      "auth_method": "API Token",
      "test_endpoint": "/models/inference/test",
      "test_command": "curl -X POST https://api-inference.huggingface.co/models/gpt2 -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'",
      "rate_limits": "30 requests/minute for free tier",
      "estimated_monthly_cost": "$0-$200 based on model complexity"
    },
    {
      "service": "Meta Ads",
      "auth_method": "OAuth 2.0 / Access Token",
      "test_endpoint": "/me/adaccounts",
      "test_command": "curl -G -d 'access_token=TOKEN' https://graph.facebook.com/v16.0/me/adaccounts",
      "rate_limits": "200 calls/hour per ad account",
      "estimated_monthly_cost": "$100-$500 depending on ad spend"
    },
    {
      "service": "Apollo.io",
      "auth_method": "API Key",
      "test_endpoint": "/v1/organizations/search",
      "test_command": "curl -H 'Cache-Control: no-cache' -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' https://api.apollo.io/v1/organizations/search",
      "rate_limits": "100 requests/minute",
      "estimated_monthly_cost": "$50-$200 depending on plan"
    }
  ],
  "integration_health_check": {
    "recommended_approach": [
      "Create comprehensive test suite",
      "Mock external API responses",
      "Implement circuit breakers",
      "Set up monitoring and alerting",
      "Periodic integration tests",
      "Validate authentication flows",
      "Check rate limit handling",
      "Error response mapping"
    ],
    "monitoring_tools": [
      "Datadog",
      "New Relic",
      "Prometheus",
      "Sentry"
    ],
    "test_frequency": {
      "critical_apis": "Daily",
      "secondary_apis": "Weekly"
    }
  }
}
